title: UDR: Another High Quality, Undervalued Apartment REIT
text: UDR shares have been pummeled in 2022, falling 30% despite producing record results and being positioned for an even better 2023. Investor concerns include slower rental rate growth due to macro weakness and increased supply as well as higher interest rates.

title: Can Apartment REITs Handle Higher Interest Expense?
text: Some REITs will see far more pressure on AFFO per share going into 2023. We dug through the debts for each REIT and prepared a model for the impact of higher rates.

title: How Much Upside is Left in UDR (UDR)? Wall Street Analysts Think 44%
text: The consensus price target hints at a 43.7% upside potential for UDR (UDR). While empirical research shows that this sought-after metric is hardly effective, an upward trend in earnings estimate revisions could mean that the stock will witness an upside in the near term.
